title: Federal Reserve keeps interest rates steady as inflation uncertainty rises
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates steady amid rising inflation uncertainty. This decision was made for the third consecutive meeting. Current date is May
excerpt: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates steady amid rising inflation uncertainty. This decision was made for the third consecutive meeting. Current date is May 4, 2026.

content.introduction: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates steady amid rising inflation uncertainty. This decision was made for the third consecutive meeting. Current date is May 4, 2026.
body: The Federal Reserve is keeping interest rates unchanged as stubborn inflation and rising uncertainty continue to weigh on the economy.
The US Federal Reserve has left its benchmark interest rate unchanged for the third straight meeting as policymakers grappled with the policy impact of
The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady on Wednesday (Apr 29) in a divided decision that noted rising concerns about inflation.
